incidents.title: Rate limit bypass caused 45-minute database brownout during flash sale
incidents.root_cause: Malformed request bypassed rate limiter. Database saturated at 95% CPU, query queue grew to 8000+, cascaded to catalog and search service errors
incidents.resolution: Emergency rate limit enforcement via WAF, database connection draining

incidents.title: Search service timeout cascade from unthrottled crawler traffic
incidents.root_cause: Third-party crawler ignored robots.txt, sent 200k req/min. No rate limit on search endpoint. Database overloaded.
incidents.resolution: Emergency per-IP rate limiting deployed, crawler blocked

incidents.title: Catalog availability dropped to 87% during product launch
incidents.root_cause: Marketing campaign drove 5x traffic spike. No rate limiting on catalog read endpoints.
incidents.resolution: Added rate limiting at API gateway layer, CDN caching for catalog reads
